name: web_sales_net_profit
description: Regressor that fits web-sale net profit from paid amount, wholesale cost, and shipping cost.
comment: Structured monetary regression over web-sales measures where the target is not passed as an input.

name: web_sales_net_paid
description: Three-input regressor that fits net paid from extended sales price, discount amount, and tax.
comment: Included as a structured arithmetic regression task over standard TPC-DS web-sales measures, where the target should be closely determined by the provided monetary inputs.

name: web_sales_ship_mode_classifier
description: Proxy-label classifier that predicts whether the order used a low, medium, or high ship-mode key range from sales attributes and shipping cost.
comment: Kept as a coarse proxy-label benchmark rather than a semantic rule: the goal is to see whether order size, taxes, and shipping cost carry enough signal to recover broad ship-mode classes.
target_expression: CASE WHEN ws_ship_mode_sk < 7 THEN 0 WHEN ws_ship_mode_sk < 14 THEN 1 ELSE 2 END
